message:
test(setup): add assertion for json_escape helper in shell block

Add test assertion to verify that the generated shell integration block
includes the json_escape helper function. This helper is used to safely
escape strings for JSON embedding in shell scripts.

The json_escape function is critical for status updates that may contain
special characters (quotes, backslashes, newlines) that would otherwise
break the JSON structure when embedded in shell commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
